title: senecio squalidus subsp. rupestris
intro: Senecio squalidus subsp. rupestris, also known as the mountain everlasting, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Senecio squalidus subsp. rupestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can be dried and used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
